creator: sms3h2@gmail.com
text: Currently to compile against libzfs, or libzfs_core you need to have the entire kernel source available. Compiling against it is also a pain as many kernel only types seem to "leak" through or are present and shouldn't have to be. There should be a port for zfs-devel or something similar with the required headers need to link compile against libzfs, or libzfs_core.
